name: Employer didn't give ear plugs and now I'm deaf in one ear, sue them?

mainEntity.name: Employer didn't give ear plugs and now I'm deaf in one ear, sue them?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers comp yes; sue if negligence beyond.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: File workers' comp first; sue third parties or for negligence if extra.[1][4] Context: OSHA requires protection above 85 dB; failures prove liability.[6] Key factors: No protection logs, high noise tests, medical link.[1] Practical guidance: Report to employer, file claim, document all; attorney pursues full damages.[1][7] Comp covers basics, suits add pain compensation.

description: Workers comp yes; sue if negligence beyond.[1]
